## Padding type

Specifies the padding to use on each of the four sides of a rectangle area.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type Padding = Scale | [Scale, Scale] | [Scale, Scale, Scale, Scale] | {
    top?: Scale;
    right?: Scale;
    bottom?: Scale;
    left?: Scale;
    rest?: Scale;
};
```
**References:** [Scale](./openrct2-flexui.scale.md)
